economic_notes: Organization has interests in fisheries (fishing quotas, fishing leases, fishing contributions), forestry operations, gas station, restaurant, excavation, and a gravel pit. Subsidiaries include Micmacs Housing Corporation, Gesgapegiag Human Resource Development Commission, Gesgapegiag Natural Resources Inc., 9252-9106 Quebec Inc., 9309-0942 Quebec Inc., 9272-4152 Quebec Inc., Gesgapegiag Business Corporation Inc., and Gesgapegiag Wealth Management Inc. Joint arrangements include Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Business Corporation (33%), Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Resources L.P. (33%), and Salaweg Inc. (33%).
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for four reasons: (1) $7,863,979 deferred contribution related to tangible capital assets presented in liabilities rather than recognized as revenue on acquisition — a departure from PSAS; (2) interest in Mi'gmawei Mawiomi Resources L.P. accounted at cost ($100) rather than modified equity method; (3) interest in Salaweg Inc. accounted at cost ($33,333) rather than modified equity method; (4) housing units - Article 95 accounted per CMHC requirements rather than PSAS. The consolidated group includes 7 fully consolidated subsidiaries. Three joint arrangements (33% each) are accounted at cost rather than equity method. Net debt of $7,865,225 as at March 31, 2021. COVID-19 impacts noted. CEBA loan of $120,000 received with $30,000 forgivable portion recognized in earnings. Annual debt service figure represents total loan repayments per cash flow statement.
